title: 8.18ct Lab-Grown Ruby Halo Ring S925 JRURR489Y
description:
Product Description:

This stunning lab-grown ruby ring, set in high-quality S925 sterling silver, showcases a perfect blend of elegance and sophistication. The durable and hypoallergenic properties of S925 silver ensure comfort, while the radiant design makes this piece a statement of luxury.

At the center of this beautiful ring is a mesmerizing 10x14mm, 8.18-carat oval-cut lab-grown ruby, with its deep, rich red color symbolizing love, strength, and passion. The ruby is surrounded by two halos of round-cut accent stones, creating a dazzling effect that amplifies its brilliance. Additionally, the band is adorned with a semi-circle of round-cut stones, adding even more sparkle and depth to the design. With a total weight of 2.29 carats in accent stones, this ring offers a radiant, luxurious feel. Weighing 6.55 grams, it is perfectly balanced for both comfort and elegance. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Lab-Grown Ruby Center Stone: A striking 10x14mm, 8.18-carat oval-cut ruby with a rich, passionate red hue.

Double Halo Design: Two sparkling halos of round-cut accent stones surround the central ruby, enhancing its brilliance.

Semi-Circle Accent Stones on the Band: Additional round-cut stones are set along the band, creating a continuous shine.

S925 Sterling Silver: Hypoallergenic, tarnish-resistant, and crafted for lasting wear.

Luxurious Weight: Weighs 6.55 grams, offering a comfortable yet substantial fit.

A true statement of elegance and sophistication, this ruby ring is the ideal choice for those who want to make a bold and luxurious impression with a timeless piece.
